description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the clojure:openjdk-8-lein-alpine Docker image. Define two stages: test and deploy. Add a test job (stage test) that runs lein test. Add a pages job (stage deploy) that runs lein do clean, codox then mv ./target/doc ./public, publishes the public/ directory as a pages artifact, and runs only on the master branch. Add a deploy job (stage deploy) that runs lein with-profile ci deploy clojars and also runs only on the master branch.
